creator: thinker@branda.to
text:
This port is required by py-GinGin.

mez_xml is a template engine. It generates a Python template module for a
XML or XHTML file.

Mercurial Repository:

    http://hg.assembla.com/mez_xml/

Latest Versions:

    http://www.assembla.com/spaces/files/mez_xml

WWW: http://trac-hg.assembla.com/mez_xml

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
